title: Quality System Anomaly Record
description: A single detected anomaly produced by the anomaly detection pipeline after each D1 data refresh. Every record corresponds to an anomaly_detected event in the audit trail.

anomaly_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this anomaly record (UUID v4).

detected_at.description: ISO 8601 date-time (UTC) at which the anomaly was detected by the pipeline.

anomaly_type.description: Classification of the anomaly. Determines which detection check produced it and which fields are expected to be populated.

severity.description: Severity level at time of detection. May be escalated after initial detection (e.g., source_stale warning→critical at 2x cadence).

npi.description: 10-digit National Provider Identifier this anomaly pertains to. Null for system-wide or source-level anomalies (e.g., source_stale, source_record_count_change, cohort_shift).

dimension.description: Scoring dimension affected (e.g., safety, quality, utilization, experience, cost, composite, or bundle:<specialty_slug>). Null for anomalies not tied to a specific dimension.

description.description: Human-readable description of the anomaly, including the observed values and why the condition was flagged.

current_value.description: The current (new) value that triggered the anomaly. For score anomalies: the new score (number). For source anomalies: record count or status string. Null if not applicable.

previous_value.description: The prior value from the previous cycle or pull. For score anomalies: the prior score (number). For source anomalies: prior record count or status string. Null if no prior value exists (e.g., data_appearance).

source_id.description: The source registry ID of the data source involved, if applicable (e.g., nppes, oig_leie). Null for anomalies not tied to a specific source.

refresh_cycle_id.description: The pipeline run identifier that produced this anomaly. Matches the refresh_cycle_id in the score snapshot store and audit trail.

reviewed.description: Whether this anomaly has been reviewed by an ops team member. Set to false at creation; updated to true when a resolution is recorded.

reviewed_at.description: ISO 8601 date-time (UTC) at which the review was completed. Null if not yet reviewed.

reviewed_by.description: Authenticated user ID of the ops team member who reviewed the anomaly (e.g., user:jsmith). Null if not yet reviewed.

resolution.description: Outcome of the review. Null if not yet reviewed.

resolution_notes.description: Free-text notes from the reviewer explaining the resolution decision, any corrective actions taken, or threshold tuning recommendations. Null if not yet reviewed or no notes provided.

audit_event_id.description: UUID of the anomaly_detected audit trail event (audit_trail_schema.json) that was written when this anomaly record was created.

examples.description: Provider safety score dropped 43.2 points (from 88.1 to 44.9) between the 2026-Q1 and 2026-Q2 refresh cycles.
Source oig_leie has not been refreshed in 32 days, exceeding its expected 30-day cadence.
examples.resolution_notes: OIG LEIE site was undergoing maintenance. Pull completed manually on 2026-04-10. No score impact; within acceptable window.
